title: DevPilot Remote Runner Experimental Registry
description: Metadata-only registry for future remote runners. Sprint 98 keeps all remote execution disabled by default.

runners.title: Experimental disabled remote runner profile
runners.description: Placeholder profile for enterprise architecture review. It cannot execute commands or contact remote systems.
notes: Future enablement requires ADR, approval workflow, sandboxing, authentication, transport security and dedicated evals.
Implemented-initial: this registry is not a remote execution capability.
The CLI exposes status only; execution attempts remain blocked.
